description: 🚗❄️ Stuck in the Cold? We’ve Got Your Back! ❄️🚗 With the frigid temperatures hitting, battery issues can become a real hassle. If you find yourself needing a jump start, don’t hesitate to call us at Nodak Towing and Recovery! 📞 Call us at 701-509-9851 for fast and reliable service. Stay safe and warm out there!

layoutDescription: Diagonal or angled section dividers (clip-path or skewed bands); hero with angled color block behind headline; dynamic but not chaotic.
mood: Reliable, local, ready when you need us — competent and direct
antiPatterns: No menu or reservation language. Phone must be tel: in header and hero. Sticky mobile call bar required. Industrial clarity beats decoration.
photoInventory: You will receive 10 real Facebook photos: hero = storefront/work sample, gallery slots = additional post photos. Design image areas as 16:9 or 4:3 placeholders.
